metadata.title: AI+1 — AI+1 series 1/4
_variant_todo: rewrite every beat narration_text in the Teardown register (voices/teardown/VOICE.md + CLAUDE-BRAND.md) — voice only, facts unchanged
signature tangent 0-1 per video, ONLY on a clear opportunity (see SKILL)
swap the outro to the Claude outro from AUTHOR.MD :: NikBearBrown
then build audience-namespaced (audio in the new voice, scenes in the new palette)

beats.narration_text: The claim 'you are not locked to our software, because there is not any' is the one I want to stress-test before I trust it. I'd need to hand this to my own instructors and edit it heavily. Help me: (1) map what actually lives inside the zip, base videos, exams, and rights, and how each survives if the vendor vanished; (2) lay out a concrete edit pass in a CLI where I rewrite examples and put my name on it; (3) compare, for my situation, the free canonical layer against paying for the custom zip and rights.

props.command: The claim 'you are not locked to our software, because there is not any' is the one I want to stress-test before I trust it. I'd need to hand this to my own instructors and edit it heavily. Help me: (1) map what actually lives inside the zip, base videos, exams, and rights, and how each survives if the vendor vanished; (2) lay out a concrete edit pass in a CLI where I rewrite examples and put my name on it; (3) compare, for my situation, the free canonical layer against paying for the custom zip and rights.

beats.narration_text: The canonical layer first. Every course is a textbook on Kindle for one dollar — free on Kindle Unlimited. Every lecture is on our YouTube, free. Every slide deck runs as a voiced, animated page on our site. That is not a sample. That is the whole course.

props.heading: The canonical layer
props.body:
$1 Kindle textbook (free on Kindle Unlimited).
Complete course on YouTube — free.
Voiced animated decks on the site.

Not a sample. The whole course.

beats.narration_text: When you need your own version — your program, your examples, your name on it — you email info at humanitarians dot A I. We quote a price. You get a zip: the base videos, the exams, and the rights to transform it into your book, your course, your workshop.

props.heading: The custom version
props.body:
Email info@humanitarians.ai → we quote a price.
The zip ships: base videos, exams, transform rights.

Your book. Your course. Your workshop.

beats.narration_text: The zip opens in any C L I — Claude Code, Codex, whichever you use. Point your tools at it and start editing: rename, reorder, rewrite, rebrand. You are not locked to our software, because there is not any.

props.heading: No lock-in
props.body:
Opens in any CLI — Claude Code, Codex, whichever you use.
Rename. Reorder. Rewrite. Rebrand.

No platform. No proprietary software.

beats.narration_text: Quick check before the next part. If your world is a university learning system, guess what the zip exports to. Got a guess?

props.command: what does the zip export to for a university LMS?

beats.narration_text: Canvas. The zip exports a dot I M S C C cartridge you upload directly — modules, videos, exams, in place. And if you would rather we run it: custom training, or a white-label workshop your own experts deliver.

props.heading: Straight into Canvas
props.body:
.imscc cartridge → direct Canvas upload.
Modules, videos, exams — in place.

Or: custom training / white-label workshops.

beats.narration_text: Let's recap with Claude. One page. The canon is a dollar. The custom version is a quote away, ships as a zip, opens in any C L I, lands in Canvas, and your experts can deliver it as a workshop. And every purchase funds a nonprofit's programs. That is AI plus one.

artifactLines: Canonical: $1 Kindle textbook (free on Kindle Unlimited) · free YouTube videos · voiced animated decks.
Custom: email info@humanitarians.ai for a quote — the zip ships base videos, exams, transform rights.
Yours: opens in any CLI · exports .imscc straight into Canvas · white-label workshops available.
From a 501(c)(3): purchases fund fellows, mentorship, and free AI education.
Phase gate: we build the base · you make it yours · your experts deliver it.

beats.narration_text: Your turn — this takes two minutes. Paste this into Claude and find your course. The dollar version is the honest demo; the custom version is one email after that.

props.command: List the Humanitarians AI courses at humanitarians.ai/courses, find the one closest to what I teach, and show me its three canonical forms: the $1 Kindle book, the YouTube playlist, and the voiced deck on the site.
